name: Visier People Analytics REST API
what_it_does: Visier people analytics REST API for HR leaders, CHROs, and workforce analytics teams to access workforce intelligence, employee attrition prediction, diversity and equity analytics, workforce planning, talent acquisition analytics, and compensation benchmarking — enabling automated people data analysis, workforce planning scenarios, DEI reporting, attrition risk identification, and HR KPI dashboards through Visier's cloud-native people analytics platform serving 50,000+ organizations. Enables AI agents to manage workforce analytics for headcount, attrition, and diversity KPI automation, handle attrition prediction for employee flight risk identification and retention automation, access pay equity for compensation fairness analysis and gap reporting automation, retrieve workforce planning for headcount scenario and capacity planning automation, manage talent analytics for recruitment funnel and time-to-fill tracking automation, handle DEI reporting for diversity representation and equity metric automation, access performance analytics for employee performance distribution analytics automation, retrieve engagement for employee survey and sentiment analytics automation, manage benchmarking for market compensation and workforce KPI comparison automation, and integrate Visier with HRIS (Workday, SAP SuccessFactors), ATS, and payroll for unified people analytics automation.
use_cases: Predicting employee attrition and identifying retention risk factors for HR analytics automation agents
Analyzing pay equity and compensation gaps for DEI compliance and fairness automation agents
Planning workforce scenarios and headcount for strategic HR planning automation agents
Tracking talent acquisition funnel metrics and recruiter performance for TA analytics automation agents
not_for: Real-time HR transactions (Visier is analytics and insights, not HRIS for operational HR transactions)
Employee self-service (Visier is for HR and business leaders, not employee-facing HR portal)
Payroll processing (Visier is people analytics, not payroll calculation or disbursement)
best_when: An HR leader, CHRO, or workforce analytics team at a mid-market or enterprise company wanting AI agents to automate people analytics, predict attrition, analyze pay equity, model workforce scenarios, and track DEI metrics through Visier's cloud-native people analytics platform.
avoid_when: HRIS DATA INTEGRATION IS REQUIRED: Visier analytics requires HRIS data integration; automated standalone analytics assumption creates no_people_data without HRIS connection; automated must connect Visier to HRIS (Workday, SAP, ADP) before analytics are available. DATA PREPARATION TAKES TIME: Visier requires data mapping and validation during implementation; automated instant analytics assumption creates implementation_required for first deployment; automated must allow implementation timeline for data preparation. EMPLOYEE PII REQUIRES DATA GOVERNANCE: Visier processes individual employee data; automated unrestricted access assumption creates data_privacy_risk without proper data governance; automated must implement appropriate access controls and data minimization for employee analytics. SMALL POPULATION SUPPRESSION: Visier suppresses analytics for small employee groups to protect individual privacy; automated granular-small-group analytics assumption creates data_suppressed for groups below minimum threshold; automated must design analytics with Visier population suppression rules in mind.

auth.notes: Visier uses OAuth2 for people analytics REST/GraphQL API. REST/GraphQL with JSON. Vancouver, BC HQ. Founded 2010 by John Schwarz. Products: Visier People Analytics, Visier Embedded Analytics, Visier Talent Acquisition. 50,000+ organizations, 25M+ employees analyzed. HRIS integrations: Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, ADP, Oracle HCM. GraphQL for custom analytics. Backed by Goldman Sachs, Meritech. Competes with OrgVue, ChartHop, and Workday People Analytics for HR analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified HR organizations; production requires Visier subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee analyzed; Embedded Analytics partner pricing; implementation services
pricing.notes: Vancouver BC. Goldman Sachs backed. Annual PEPA subscription. 50K+ organizations. HR analytics leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; analytics query APIs throttled per tenant size

known_agent_gotchas: ANALYTIC OBJECTS ARE VISIER-SPECIFIC: Visier uses pre-built analytic objects (Headcount, Attrition Rate, Pay Equity); automated generic metrics assumption creates metric_not_found for non-Visier terminology; automated must use Visier's specific analytic object and metric names

POPULATION SUPPRESSION PROTECTS PRIVACY: Visier suppresses results for small populations (<5-10 employees); automated granular-analytics assumption creates data_suppressed for small team or location queries; automated must handle and communicate suppression results appropriately

DATA LOADS HAVE LATENCY: Visier processes HRIS data on scheduled load cycles; automated real-time HR data assumption creates stale_workforce_data for recent hires or terminations; automated must account for Visier data load latency from HRIS

GRAPHQL IS MORE POWERFUL FOR ANALYTICS: Visier GraphQL enables flexible metric composition; automated REST-only assumption misses advanced analytics capabilities; automated should use Visier GraphQL API for complex custom analytics queries

TENANT ISOLATION IS STRICT: Visier multi-tenant architecture prevents cross-company data access; automated multi-company analytics assumption creates data_isolation_enforced; automated must use separate Visier instances per company for multi-company HR analytics
agent_readiness.security_notes: People analytics. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Employee workforce and compensation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: People analytics. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Employee workforce and HR data.
